query: What vaccines am I due for?
label: warm_P5.7
answer:
Hi Soham,
Your last cholesterol reading (April 5, 2026):

Total Cholesterol: 237 mg/dL (elevated)
LDL: 162 mg/dL (elevated)
HDL: 38 mg/dL (low)
Triglycerides: 186 mg/dL (elevated)

These numbers suggest your cholesterol levels need attention. Your doctor has already referred you to a cardiologist, which is the right next step.
Vaccines you're due for:
Looking at your vaccination record from April 10, you're up to date with:

Childhood vaccines ✓
COVID-19 series ✓
Annual flu shots ✓

One note: Your record shows HPV vaccination was not received. Depending on your age and risk factors, ask your doctor whether this is recommended for you.
You're also due for your annual flu shot in the autumn if we're past that season.
Not medical advice — talk to your doctor before acting on this.
